The Woman's club calendar for
next week is as follows:


Monday, October 17-Board meet
ing at p. m. at the Carnegie lib
rary. Miss Minnie ]. Reynolds will
give an address ON Law and the
Lady"


Tuesday, October 1S-Elocution
at the Carnegie library from 2:2Q to
5p. M; Mrs. Branch s. Jones, chair
man; Mrs. Pauline Dunstan Belden,
instructor. First and second year
classes In French to meet at the
home of Mrs. Belle Deming. 1908
Eleventh avenue; first year class
from 2:45 to $3.50 p. M; second
year class from $3.50 to 4:15 p. M:
Miss Kate Reed, chairman; Prof.
Maurice lie Gras, Instructor.


Wednesday, October 19-Domes-
tic science at the library at 2 p. M;
Mrs. w. G. Hall, chairman; Miss
Anna M. Rogers. teacher. Stencil
ing class, $50 to 4:30 at the home
Of Mrs. Fofpick, 01226 Monroe; Mrs.
G. Elmer Brown. chairman; Mr.. r.
w. Little, teacher.
